form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Port Macquarie Cl1-Sw on March 24 over 1800m, slow going 3.5 len behind Highland Hustle carrying 59kg at $3.60. The start before that 5th of 11 at Taree Cl1-Sw on March 10 over 1600m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Ngunnawal with 59kg at $5. Has ability and can do much better.
